network_assets.name: Cisco Catalyst 9300 48-port PoE+ Access Switch
network_assets.notes: Traditional LAN access switch. 48 x 1GbE PoE+ access ports; modular fibre uplinks. PoE budget depends on installed power supplies.
network_assets.capacity_source: Cisco Catalyst 9300 Series Switches Data Sheet
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Cisco Catalyst 9300 Multigigabit UPOE Access Switch
network_assets.notes: 48-port 5G/2.5G/1G/100M multigigabit access switch with up to 60W PoE per port; modular uplinks.
network_assets.capacity_source: Cisco Catalyst 9300 Series Switches Data Sheet
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Cisco Catalyst 9500 Core Switch
network_assets.notes: Core/distribution switch for redundant MER deployment. 24 x 1/10/25G fibre and 4 x 40/100G uplink ports.
network_assets.capacity_source: Cisco Catalyst 9500 Series Switches Data Sheet
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Cisco Catalyst 8300 Edge Router
network_assets.notes: Asset role: network_router. Cisco IOS XE edge/SD-WAN router with six integrated Layer 3 Ethernet ports and modular expansion.
network_assets.capacity_source: Cisco Catalyst 8300 Series Edge Platforms Data Sheet; packet rate is a 1400-byte equivalent derived from published IPv4 throughput
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Cisco Catalyst 9166I Wi-Fi 6E Access Point
network_assets.notes: Indoor Wi-Fi 6/6E access point. 1 x multigigabit 100M/1G/2.5G/5G Ethernet. Powered by 802.3at/802.3bt or Cisco UPOE.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: HPE Aruba Networking CX 6300M PoE Access Switch
network_assets.notes: 48-port 1GbE PoE access switch with 4 x SFP56 uplink/stacking ports. PoE budget depends on PSU configuration.
network_assets.capacity_source: HPE Aruba Networking CX 6300 Switch Series QuickSpecs (JL661A model switching and throughput capacity)
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: HPE Aruba Networking Wi-Fi 7 Access Point
network_assets.notes: Indoor tri-band enterprise Wi-Fi 7 access point. Confirm regional 6 GHz availability and final PoE class during design.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Juniper EX4400 48-port PoE Access Switch
network_assets.notes: 48 x 1GbE PoE access ports with up to 90W per port; total PoE budget up to 2200W with two standard power supplies.
network_assets.capacity_source: Juniper EX4400 Ethernet Switch product specifications
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Juniper MX304 Core/Edge Router
network_assets.notes: Asset role: network_router. Carrier-grade core/edge routing platform; up to 4.8 Tbps throughput in 2RU. Port count depends on selected interface configuration. Structured port rows represent a selected planning configuration; confirm the final chassis, line-card and interface selection before procurement.
network_assets.capacity_source: Juniper MX304 Universal Routing Platform specifications; packet rate is a 1400-byte equivalent derived from published throughput
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: RUCKUS R770 Wi-Fi 7 Access Point
network_assets.notes: Indoor tri-radio Wi-Fi 7 AP. 1 x 1/2.5/5/10GbE plus 1 x 1GbE; combined maximum PHY rate approximately 12.22Gbps.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Cisco Copper Patch Panel 48-port Cat6A
network_assets.notes: Generic 19-inch rack-mounted Cat6A copper patch panel for traditional structured cabling.

network_assets.name: Fibre Patch Panel 24-port LC Duplex
network_assets.notes: Rack-mounted OS2 single-mode fibre patch panel with 24 LC duplex positions.

network_assets.name: Tellabs FlexSym OLT2 PoLAN Optical Line Terminal
network_assets.notes: PoLAN OLT supporting GPON and XGS-PON. Two PON interfaces, up to 128 ONTs at 64:1 split, and four 1/10G SFP+ network interfaces.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Tellabs ONT180C High-density PoLAN ONT
network_assets.notes: Enterprise PoLAN ONT with high-density Gigabit Ethernet connectivity. Remote DC-powered versions can support up to 300W PoE.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Tellabs FlexSym ONT202 XGS-PON ONT
network_assets.notes: XGS-PON ONT with two multigigabit Ethernet ports. Supports PoE/PoE+ with up to 60W per port.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Nokia Lightspan DF PoLAN Optical Line Terminal
network_assets.notes: Compact 1RU OLT family supporting GPON, XGS-PON, Multi-PON and 25G PON. Exact PON and uplink port count depends on selected Lightspan DF model. Structured port rows represent a selected planning configuration; confirm the final chassis, line-card and interface selection before procurement.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: ADTRAN SDX 6400 PoLAN Optical Line Terminal
network_assets.notes: High-capacity passive optical network OLT family supporting next-generation PON. Confirm chassis, line-card and PON port selection for the project. Structured port rows represent a selected planning configuration; confirm the final chassis, line-card and interface selection before procurement.
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: PoLAN Fibre Splitter 1:32
network_assets.notes: Passive PLC optical splitter with one input and 32 outputs. Include connector and insertion-loss allowance in detailed design.

network_assets.name: PoLAN Fibre Splitter 1:64
network_assets.notes: Passive PLC optical splitter with one input and 64 outputs. Confirm optical budget against OLT class, fibre length, connector losses and ONT sensitivity.

network_assets.name: PoLAN Fibre Splitter 1:128
network_assets.notes: Passive PLC optical splitter with one input and 128 outputs. Use only where the selected PON technology and optical power budget permit this split.

network_assets.name: Cisco Catalyst 9500X High-Capacity Core Switch
network_assets.notes: Preferred fixed-form-factor campus core switch. Use as a resilient pair, one in each MER. Supports 60 high-speed fibre ports and four 400G-capable uplinks.
network_assets.capacity_source: Cisco Catalyst 9500 Series Switches Data Sheet (C9500X switching ASIC capacity and forwarding rate)
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Cisco Catalyst 9606R Modular High-Capacity Core Switch
network_assets.notes: Modular chassis core option configured as four 56-port fibre line cards. Deploy as two independent chassis, one per MER, for high availability and future growth. Final PSU and line-card selection must be confirmed during detailed design.
network_assets.capacity_source: Cisco Catalyst 9600 Series Supervisor Engine 2 Data Sheet; aggregate chassis switching capacity
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: HPE Aruba Networking CX 10000 High-Capacity Core Switch
network_assets.notes: Alternative high-capacity core switch with 48 x 25G and 6 x 100G ports. Deploy as a resilient pair in separate MERs.
network_assets.capacity_source: HPE Aruba Networking CX 10000 Switch Series Data Sheet
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Juniper QFX5120 High-Capacity Core Switch
network_assets.notes: Alternative fixed-form-factor core/distribution switch. Deploy as a resilient pair, one in each MER.
network_assets.capacity_source: Juniper QFX5120 Ethernet Switch product specifications
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Tellabs FlexSym BOLT PoLAN Optical Line Terminal
network_assets.notes: 16 Port OLT
network_assets.traffic_estimate_basis: Engineering estimate of device management/control traffic only; carried client traffic is calculated separately by the planner.

network_assets.name: Protected PoLAN Fibre Splitter 2:64
network_assets.notes: Passive PLC optical splitter with one input and 64 outputs. Confirm optical budget against OLT class, fibre length, connector losses and ONT sensitivity. Auto-generated 2:N protected splitter/coupler for primary and standby OLT feeder inputs.

network_assets.name: Protected PoLAN Fibre Splitter 2:32
network_assets.notes: Passive PLC optical splitter with one input and 32 outputs. Include connector and insertion-loss allowance in detailed design. Auto-generated 2:N protected splitter/coupler for primary and standby OLT feeder inputs.

network_assets.name: 2U rack UPS
network_assets.notes: Automatically generated dual-UPS rack allowance.

network_assets.name: 1U horizontal cable management loop
network_assets.notes: Automatically generated 1U horizontal cable-management allowance.
